go_runtime_scope: local/copied-data thumbnail generation candidate for upload surfaces only
parity_scope: _thumb.webp is generated from valid upload images
thumbnail quality uses the existing Prism Go WebP helper default
standard upload keeps original plus companion thumbnail
thumbnail_only=true writes only the _thumb.webp response file when thumbnail generation succeeds
thumbnail generation failures roll back partial original writes for direct upload
Python upload/import live routes still delegate thumbnail helper execution to Go until route ownership is promoted

allowed_next_step.reason: Direct-upload thumbnail generation is closed as a local/copied-data candidate; the next upload boundary is remote upload-url.
